overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked elevated highway at night through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The vehicle travels at moderate speed through heavy rain, passing digital billboards and concrete infrastructure while following traffic through winding highway sections and into a covered tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway in heavy rain

events.description: approaching and passing under overhead highway gantry with directional signage

agents.ego_description: driving on rain-slicked highway following a white sedan at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed
yellow car positioned on the right shoulder or slow lane

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure spanning the highway with directional signs
tall concrete retaining wall lining the left side of the elevated highway
tall concrete retaining wall with metal fencing on the right side
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light on the wet pavement
illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful neon content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, with the vehicle traveling behind a white sedan. Overhead gantry signs loom ahead while concrete noise barriers flank both sides. Digital billboards begin appearing on the right, casting neon reflections on the wet asphalt as street lamps illuminate the heavy rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor passing under overpasses and gantries

events.description: passing under concrete overpass structure with support pillars
slight lane adjustment while navigating through highway corridor

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while navigating through sections with overhead structures and passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking in the left lane
white van maintaining position ahead in traffic

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structures
illuminated advertising screen on the left retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under concrete overpass structures with thick support pillars visible. Digital billboards now line both sides of the highway, creating a corridor of neon light. A silver sedan overtakes on the left while the road continues straight through the elevated infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with dense digital billboard corridors

events.description: highway curves gently to the right through the billboard corridor
approaching tunnel entrance with illuminated portal ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating the curving highway while passing other vehicles and approaching a tunnel

notable_agents.action: orange sports car driving in the right lane

entered.detail: dark tunnel portal with illuminated entrance becoming visible in the distance
white painted arrows and lane markings indicating the curve direction

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to the right through a dense corridor of digital billboards on both sides. Road markings indicate the curve direction as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance in the distance. An orange sports car is visible in the right lane while the rain continues to fall on the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with enclosed walls

events.description: entering the covered tunnel section with artificial lighting becoming dominant
fully inside the enclosed highway tunnel with walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: driving into and through the covered tunnel section, transitioning from open highway to enclosed space

entered.detail: entrance to the covered highway section with concrete framing
solid concrete walls replacing the open noise barriers
solid concrete walls with continuous digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway tunnel, transitioning from the rain-exposed elevated road to an enclosed concrete corridor. The tunnel walls are lined with continuous digital billboards and artificial lighting illuminates the path ahead. The sound of rain fades as the vehicle proceeds through the sheltered section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transforms from a stark concrete corridor into a vibrant tunnel of neon light. It begins with the vehicle trailing a white sedan beneath looming gantry signs, where street lamps illuminate heavy rainfall and concrete noise barriers flank the road. As the vehicle advances, digital billboards emerge on the right, casting colorful reflections across the wet asphalt. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under massive concrete overpass pillars, with the billboards expanding to line both sides of the highway. Finally, the environment opens into a corridor of brilliant neon light as a silver sedan overtakes on the left while the road continues straight through the elevated infrastructure.

The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked elevated highway that transitions into a sheltered, neon-lit tunnel. It begins as the vehicle curves to the right through a dense corridor of digital billboards, passing an orange sports car under a steady downpour. As the road bends, the camera tracks toward a distant tunnel entrance, with road markings guiding the path through the rain. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters the covered highway, moving from the exposed elements into an enclosed concrete corridor. Finally, the artificial lighting of the tunnel takes over and the sound of rain fades while the vehicle proceeds past a continuous line of glowing advertisements.
